name: Roofinity
origin: Pixel-perfect clone of roofinity.framer.website. Niche couvreur/toiture — exploitable pour pages metiers RNM toiture/charpente/isolation-toiture.
features: horizontal hero form with bg image + dark gradient
full-bleed CTA banner with bg image
teal #085B69 footer with 4 cols + roof bg CTA

structure.keep/: 22 roofing/couvreur photos — REUSE for renovation-toiture, charpente, isolation-toiture, couvreur metier pages. ALL service cards on homepage use these.
structure.avatars/: 9 avatars (3 reviewer + 6 team) — replace with our generated/stock per site
structure.brand/: logo header/footer SVGs + favicon — replace with site brand per site

notes: Cloned from roofinity.framer.website (Framer roofing services template)
Bucket A (keep/) photos = professional roofing photography we cannot reproduce — preserved for our renovation-toiture, couvreur, charpente, isolation-toiture pages and toiture-related blog articles
Bucket B (replace/) deleted — original template had 3 off-theme placeholders (woman/chairs/etc) that we removed. Service cards on homepage now use keep/ photos exclusively for visual coherence
No Gemini AI infrastructure (visualizer / before-after carousel) bundled — pure design clone. Greffe manually if needed by importing components from template-15 or template-16
Designed to ranks #1 visual quality + clean SEO via Manrope+Inter typography + 100px section padding
All routes prerender as static (next build)
